headline: Block’s Cash App Bets On Stablecoins And AI Reshaping Investor Narrative
summary: Block (NYSE:XYZ) is adding stablecoin support to Cash App, reflecting a shift in its stance on digital assets. The company is introducing Moneybot, an AI powered payments assistant that sits inside core Cash App payment flows. These moves follow large scale AI driven restructuring and job cuts, and mark a new phase focused on product direction rather than workforce changes. At a share price of $65.6, Block sits in a part of the market where investors often watch product updates closely. The...
